bird.name: Variegated fairywren
bird.summary: The variegated fairywren (Malurus lamberti) is a fairywren that lives in eastern Australia. As a species that exhibits sexual dimorphism, t…

relations.subject: Variegated fairywren
relations.evidence: The variegated fairywren is found in scrubland with plenty of vegetation providing dense cover. They have been reported to shelter in mammal burrows to avoid extreme heat.{{cite journal |author=Marchant S |year=1992 |title= A bird observatory at Moruya, N.S.W
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
